claim_text: zhouwang2004 specifies the standard SSIM hyperparameters (Gaussian window, K1=0.01, K2=0.03, dynamic range L=255) used in the manuscript's NRMSE/SSIM/PSNR computations.

sub_claims.text: zhouwang2004 specifies an 11x11 circular-symmetric Gaussian weighting window (standard deviation 1.5 samples, normalized to unit sum) for local SSIM computation.

attestation.indirect_attribution_check: Paper introduces these hyperparameters as the authors' own choices; not credited to a primary external source. The 8x8 square window in [6],[7] (UQI predecessor) is mentioned as the prior approach being replaced by the 11x11 Gaussian.
attestation.out_of_context_check: Source presents these hyperparameters as the standard SSIM parameter settings used throughout the paper; this matches the manuscript's usage as canonical SSIM hyperparameters for image quality computation.
